data.title: Hello, world from SvelteKit
data.excerpt: A blog post stored as a JSON file in @webhouse/cms and rendered by a SvelteKit page.
data.content:
## The setup

This post lives at `content/posts/hello-world.json`. **SvelteKit reads it directly** in `+page.server.ts` via the `WebhouseReader` class — no API calls, no database.

## Server-side load

SvelteKit's server `load` functions run in Node and can read the filesystem. The `cms` singleton from `$lib/webhouse.ts` handles all I/O — your `+page.svelte` just receives typed data.

## Reactive everything

Svelte 5 runes make this trivial. The `data` prop is fully typed and reactive. Use it directly in your template.
data.author: Christian Broberg
